instruction: Tell me about Madras Christian College (MCC).

instruction: Tell me about Women’s Christian College (WCC).
response: Women’s Christian College (WCC) is a Autonomous Women’s Institution (Aided Shift I / Self-Financed Shift II). It offers a wide range of UG, PG, and Research programs with a strong focus on industry-oriented learning.
